title: Dreamon Rocket Launcher for Kids with Parachute LED Light, Motorized Rechargeable Space Toys for Children Age 3+
features: [2 Height Setting] There is two height setting of this rocket toy. Simply press the launcher button for running. Press once for running 4 seconds(10-20 meters) and twice for 8 seconds(30-50 meters).

[Safe Landing] The rocket launcher is made from safe and durable EPP foam. With the built-in parachute, the air rocket launcher toy will land slowly and safely. Protective design allows kids not not be hurt when landing.
[USB Rechargable & LED Light] After fully charged in 40 minutes, the rocket launcher can be play again. With the LED light, kids can play the rocket toy in darkness.
[Educational Outdoor Games] During the outdoor play, children can be away from electronics and get exposure to basic physical knowledge such as the operation principle of propellers and parachutes.

[Innovative Gift for Boys & Girls] This rocket space toys is a ideal gifts for kids who is interested in universe, astronauts and other space things. It will inspire children to explore the power of flight and universe.
CAUTION: Use in accordance with the user's instructions.
